title: Petalochilus coactilis
taxonomy: Petalochilus coactilis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It is a succulent plant native to South Africa. The classification of Petalochilus coactilis is further broken down into the following ranks: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Core eudicots, clade Caryophyllales. At the rank of family, it is classified as Aizoaceae. Petalochilus coactilis is a member of the genus Petalochilus within the Aizoaceae family.
